title: stellaria media var. major
intro: Stellaria media var. major, commonly known as greater chickweed, is a type of flowering plant in the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of greater chickweed include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other joint-related issues. Greater chickweed can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health and well-being.
